---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an error in a schema definition, documentation, or example
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what's wrong.

## Location

Which file and field is affected? (e.g., `lexicons/world.ptah.origin.json`, `attributionChain[].role`)

## Expected

What the schema/documentation should say or do.

## Actual

What it currently says or does.

## Context

How did you encounter this? (e.g., implementing against the schema, writing records to the network, reading the spec)
